allow: Bash(rm -rf .playwright-mcp && rm -f *.png && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -2; echo "--- artifacts:"; ls | grep -iE "playwright|\\.png$" || echo "none")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '\\''*ms-playwright*'\\'' } | Stop-Process -Force; '\\''killed playwright chrome'\\''')
